name: Fried Fish Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the trout fillets (cooked and flaked), onion, green pepper, parsley, lemon juice, breadcrumbs, eggs, milk, spicy brown mustard, salt, and pepper in a large mixing bowl. Mix well.
2. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls. They can be frozen at this stage for later use; when ready to fry, partially thaw them first.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a deep pan or pot to 370°F (180°C).
4. Fry the fish balls in batches until they are golden brown.
5. Drain the fried fish balls on paper towels.
6. Serve immediately with cocktail sauce.
Yield: 5-1/2 dozen
